notes: Most Gmail triggers are 'instant' via the Gmail push notification API (users.watch + Cloud Pub/Sub). 'New Email Matching Search' falls back to polling because Gmail doesn't push search-result deltas.

triggers.name: New Attachment
triggers.description: Fires when a new attachment arrives.

triggers.name: New Email
triggers.description: Fires when a new email appears in the specified mailbox.

triggers.name: New Email Matching Search
triggers.description: Fires when a new email matches a Gmail search string.

triggers.name: New Label
triggers.description: Fires when a new label is created.

triggers.name: New Labeled Email
triggers.description: Fires when an email is labeled. Also fires when a reply is added to the conversation.

triggers.name: New Labeled Email (First Only)
triggers.description: Fires the first time a label is added to a conversation. Replies within that conversation do not fire again.

triggers.name: New Starred Email
triggers.description: Fires when an incoming email is starred within two days of arrival.

triggers.name: New Thread
triggers.description: Fires when a new email conversation begins in your inbox.
